kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.

test.name: TC_M2.2_001 - User Can Complete Full Forgot Password Flow And Reset Password

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm clear com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.

kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Your new password is set') or contains(@text,'success') or contains(@text,'updated')] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Your new password is set') or contains(@text,'success') or contains(@text,'updated')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Your new password is set') or contains(@text,'success') or contains(@text,'updated')]
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='Back to Login' or @text='Back to login']'.
xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Back to Login' or @text='Back to login']
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.EditText[@hint='Email Address'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.EditText[@hint='Email Address']
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc: Verify user can navigate the full forgot password flow: FP link → email → OTP (magic) → new password → success → back to login (m2.2.1) NOTE: This test changes the account password. Restore it manually after running, or use a dedicated FP test account to avoid affecting other tests.

test.name: TC_M2.2_002 - User Can Login Successfully After Forgot Password Reset

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'jjavier+101@nmblr.ai' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@hint='Email Address']'

Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

test.doc: Verify user can log in using the new password after completing the forgot password reset flow (m2.2.2) PRE-CONDITION: m2.2.1 (TC_M2.2_001) must have run first and set password to NewPass@2025. NOTE: After this test, the account password is NewPass@2025 — restore to Password!1 manually.

test.name: TC_M2.2_006 - Resend Code Is Disabled During Cooldown Then Enabled After 1 Minute On FP OTP Screen

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell pm clear com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the element attribute using the given ``attribute``, e.g. name, value, etc.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Resend code should become enabled after the 1-min cooldown
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Verify Resend code is not clickable during the 1-minute cooldown on the FP OTP screen, then becomes clickable once the cooldown expires (m2.2.6)

errors.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
